ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews the user has written */,
  "average_stars" REAL /* Average star rating given by the user */,
  "useful" INTEGER /* Number of times the user's reviews have been marked as useful */,
  "funny" INTEGER /* Number of times the user's reviews have been marked as funny */,
  "cool" INTEGER /* Number of times the user's reviews have been marked as cool */,
  "compliment_cool" INTEGER /* Number of compliments received for being cool */,
  "compliment_cute" INTEGER /* Number of compliments received for being cute */,
  "compliment_funny" INTEGER /* Number of compliments received for being funny */,
  "compliment_hot" INTEGER /* Number of compliments received for being hot */,
  "compliment_list" INTEGER /* Number of compliments received for creating lists */,
  "compliment_more" INTEGER /* Number of compliments received for writing more */,
  "compliment_note" INTEGER /* Number of compliments received for writing notes */,
  "compliment_photos" INTEGER /* Number of compliments received for posting photos */,
  "compliment_plain" INTEGER /* Number of compliments received for writing plain reviews */,
  "compliment_profile" INTEGER /* Number of compliments received for having a good profile */,
  "compliment_writer" INTEGER /* Number of compliments received for writing well */,
  "fans" INTEGER /* Number of fans the user has */,
  "elite" TEXT /* Elite status of the user (year or years when the user was elite) */,
  "yelping_since" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "no_friends" INTEGER /* Number of friends the user has */,
  "demographics" TEXT /* Demographic information of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Short bio or description of the user */,
  "website" TEXT /* User's website or social media links */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email for communication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number for verification or contact */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user's account is verified */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user's account is active */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* User preferences for notifications, privacy settings, etc. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "friends" (
  "friend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each friend relationship */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user */,
  "friend_user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user's friend */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the friendship (e.g., accepted, pending) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the friendship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the friendship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("friend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_friends_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_friends_friend_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("friend_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "business_id" TEXT /* ID of the business being reviewed */,
  "stars" INTEGER /* Star rating given by the user */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "useful" INTEGER /* Number of times the review has been marked as useful */,
  "funny" INTEGER /* Number of times the review has been marked as funny */,
  "cool" INTEGER /* Number of times the review has been marked as cool */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "rating_breakdown" TEXT /* Breakdown of the rating (e.g., food, service, ambiance) */,
  "photos" TEXT /* URLs of photos associated with the review */,
  "video" TEXT /* URLs of videos associated with the review */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is flagged for moderation */,
  "moderation_status" TEXT /* Status of the review in the moderation process (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "moderation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for moderation (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "businesses" (
  "business_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each business */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the business */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the business */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the business is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the business is located */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the business */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the business location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the business location */,
  "stars" REAL /* Average star rating of the business */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews the business has received */,
  "is_open" INTEGER /* Whether the business is currently open */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the business */,
  "website" TEXT /* Business's website */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Business's phone number */,
  "hours" TEXT /* Business's operating hours */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities available at the business */,
  "cuisine" TEXT /* Type of cuisine served (if applicable) */,
  "price_range" TEXT /* Price range of the business */,
  "delivery_options" TEXT /* Delivery options available (e.g., pickup, delivery) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliments" (
  "compliment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliment */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user giving the compliment */,
  "receiver_user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user receiving the compliment */,
  "compliment_type" TEXT /* Type of compliment (e.g., cool, cute, funny) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the compliment was given */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message or note associated with the compliment */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Indicates if the compliment is flagged for moderation */,
  "moderation_status" TEXT /* Status of the compliment in the moderation process (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "moderation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for moderation (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliments_receiver_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("receiver_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elite_status" (
  "elite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each elite status record */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year when the user was elite */,
  "level" TEXT /* Level of elite status (e.g., gold, platinum) */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* List of benefits associated with the elite status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("elite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elite_status_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_analytics" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews written by the user */,
  "total_compliments" INTEGER /* Total number of compliments received by the user */,
  "total_friends" INTEGER /* Total number of friends the user has */,
  "average_review_length" REAL /* Average length of the user's reviews */,
  "most_common_words" TEXT /* Most common words used by the user in reviews */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Overall engagement score of the user */,
  "total_likes" INTEGER /* Total number of likes received by the user */,
  "total_comments" INTEGER /* Total number of comments received by the user */,
  "total_shares" INTEGER /* Total number of shares received by the user */,
  "total_photos" INTEGER /* Total number of photos posted by the user */,
  "total_videos" INTEGER /* Total number of videos posted by the user */,
  "engagement_change" REAL /* Change in engagement over a period of time */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the user's reviews */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_engagement" (
  "review_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who engaged with the review */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., useful, funny, cool) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the engagement occurred */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment text if the engagement type is a comment */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Indicates if the engagement is flagged for moderation */,
  "moderation_status" TEXT /* Status of the engagement in the moderation process (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "moderation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for moderation (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id", "user_id", "engagement_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category record */,
  "business_id" TEXT /* ID of the business */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Restaurant, Bar) */,
  "parent_category" TEXT /* Parent category (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_categories_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)
